reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests the prescribing clinician consider P21 within Hunter's explicit evidence hedge: Hunter Williams, P21 The Brain Peptide (2026-04-08; 4:56; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/p21-the-brain-peptide--72289902/): "There are actually no human trials, but there is a good amount of animal data that we'll go over today." For cognitive support, Hunter Williams, Peptide Q&A · April 2026 (2026-04-30; 20:29; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/peptide-qa-april-2026--9bc7fd8c/): "Dosing wise, I like 250 micrograms, three to four times per week."
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats: Hunter Williams, P21 The Brain Peptide (2026-04-08; 13:08; https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/p21-the-brain-peptide--72289902/): "Again, there's no published human clinical trials at least that I could find out there in the research world."
